title: Resolve, to Support Pro Se Litigants Regarding the Return Receipt of Service
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Jun 3, 2025
last_house_action: 5/1/2025 - Received by the Clerk of the House on May 1, 2025. The Resolve was REFERRED to the Committee on JUDICIARY pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
last_senate_action: 6/3/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
